pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Wayle is a Wayland desktop shell written in Rust with GTK4 and Relm4. It ships the bar, notifications daemon, on-screen-display, wallpaper, and device controls (audio, network, bluetooth, battery, brightness, media) as built-in modules rather than separate processes. Compositor-specific workspace modules currently target Hyprland and Niri.
Configuration is a single TOML file with live reload, also editable through the wayle-settings GUI or the `wayle config` CLI.
